title: Evangelion The Feature Film
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion: The Feature Film             Quote Post by happy123boy » Thu Aug 11, 2016 2:30 pm I have a question regarding the Revival of Evangelion: on all of the Evangelion wikis I've seen, it's stated that Revival was released on discs 9 and 10 of the Renewal of Evangelion box set. Revival is a re-edit of Death(true) combined with the End of Evangelion. Does this mean that disc 9 was Death (true) and disc 10 was the End of Evangelion? Or were both films on one disc with special features on another?

[]: Re: Evangelion: The Feature Film             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 11, 2016 8:49 pm Revival of Evangelion isn't really a thing. It was just a theatrical engagement. If you've got Death(True)2 and The End of Evangelion, then you have Revival of Evangelion. Beyond that, I couldn't tell you, I'm not super knowledgeable of the Japanese releases, especially without having the exact one pointed out.
